heading: Returns with respect to foreign persons holding direct investments in United States real property interests
label: 6039C Returns with respect to foreign persons holding direct investments in United States real property interests
notes: Amendments1986—Subsec. (d). inserted “(and any person required to withhold tax under section 1445)” after “section 897(a)”.Pub. L. 99–5141984— amended section generally, inserting in section catchline “foreign persons holding direct investments in” and substituting in text provisions concerning returns with respect to foreign persons holding direct investments in United States real property for provisions concerning returns with respect to United States real property interests.Pub. L. 98–3691981—Subsec. (b)(4)(C). , substituted “For purposes of determining whether an entity to which this subsection applies has a substantial investor in United States real property, the assets of any person shall include the person’s pro rata share of the United States real property interest held by any corporation (whether domestic or foreign) if the person’s pro rata share of the United States real property interests exceeded $50,000” for “The assets of any entity to which this subsection applies shall include its pro rata share of the United States real property interests held by any corporation in which the entity is a substantial investor in United States real property”.Pub. L. 97–34, § 831(e)Subsec. (f). , added subsec. (f).Pub. L. 97–34, § 831(a)(3)

children.text: the name and address of such person,
a description of all United States real property interests held by such person at any time during the calendar year, and
such other information as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.

children.heading: Definition of foreign persons holding direct investments in United States real property interests
children.label: b Definition of foreign persons holding direct investments in United States real property interests

children.text: such person did not engage in a trade or business in the United States at any time during such calendar year, and
the fair market value of the United States real property interests held directly by such person at any time during such year equals or exceeds $50,000.

children.heading: United States real property interest
children.label: 1 United States real property interest
children.text: The term “United States real property interest” has the meaning given to such term by section 897(c).

children.heading: Foreign person
children.label: 2 Foreign person
children.text: The term “foreign person” means any person who is not a United States person.

children.heading: Interests held by partnerships, etc.
children.label: A Interests held by partnerships, etc.
children.text: United States real property interests held by a partnership, trust, or estate shall be treated as owned proportionately by its partners or beneficiaries.

children.heading: Interests held by family members
children.label: B Interests held by family members
children.text: United States real property interests held by the spouse or any minor child of an individual shall be treated as owned by such individual.

children.heading: Time and manner of filing return
children.label: 4 Time and manner of filing return
children.text: All returns required to be made under this section shall be made at such time and in such manner as the Secretary shall by regulations prescribe.

children.heading: Special rule for United States interest and Virgin Islands interest
children.label: d Special rule for United States interest and Virgin Islands interest

children.text: to the United States, in the case of any interest in real property located in the United States and an interest (other than an interest solely as a creditor) in a domestic corporation (with respect to the United States) described in section 897(c)(1)(A)(ii), and

to the Virgin Islands, in the case of any interest in real property located in the Virgin Islands and an interest (other than an interest solely as a creditor) in a domestic corporation (with respect to the Virgin Islands) described in section 897(c)(1)(A)(ii).
